Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format

Interface IndexEncoder

All Known Implementing Classes:
BlockChunkIndexEncoder
@AvailableSince("0.0.46") public interface IndexEncoder
Strategy interface for encoding and decoding the spatial index section of a schematic file.

A schematic file is split into two sections: a block-data section (managed by a BlockDataEncoder) that stores the raw block state for each distinct BlockData, and an index section (managed by this interface) that records where each block placement sits in world space and which block-data entry it references.

Implementations are free to choose any binary layout for the index section. The only contract is that a byte array produced by write(net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator.BlockIterator, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder, java.util.Map<net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockData, java.lang.Long>) can be fully reconstructed by read(net.apartium.cocoabeans.seekable.SeekableInputStream, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder, net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.BlockDataEncoder, net.apartium.cocoabeans.seekable.SeekableInputStream) given the same AxisOrder and a compatible BlockDataEncoder.

See Also:
  • BlockChunkIndexEncoder
  • BlockDataEncoder

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BlockIterator
    read(net.apartium.cocoabeans.seekable.SeekableInputStream indexIn, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axisOrder, BlockDataEncoder blockDataEncoder, net.apartium.cocoabeans.seekable.SeekableInputStream blockIn)
    Deserialises the index section and returns an iterator over the block placements it encodes.
    byte[]
    write(BlockIterator placements, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axisOrder, Map<BlockData,Long> blockIndexes)
    Serialises a sequence of block placements into the binary index format.

  • Method Details

    • read

      BlockIterator read(net.apartium.cocoabeans.seekable.SeekableInputStream indexIn, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axisOrder, BlockDataEncoder blockDataEncoder, net.apartium.cocoabeans.seekable.SeekableInputStream blockIn) throws IOException
      Deserialises the index section and returns an iterator over the block placements it encodes.
      Parameters:
      indexIn - seekable stream positioned at the start of the index section
      axisOrder - axis-to-index mapping that was used when the index was written; must match the value passed to write(net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator.BlockIterator, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder, java.util.Map<net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockData, java.lang.Long>)
      blockDataEncoder - encoder used to deserialise individual BlockData values from blockIn
      blockIn - seekable stream containing the raw block-data section
      Returns:
      an iterator over every BlockPlacement encoded in the index
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while reading either stream

    • write

      byte[] write(BlockIterator placements, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axisOrder, Map<BlockData,Long> blockIndexes)
      Serialises a sequence of block placements into the binary index format.

      Each placement is mapped to the corresponding entry in blockIndexes so that the index stores byte offsets into the block-data section rather than inline block state.

      Parameters:
      placements - iterator over the block placements to encode
      axisOrder - axis-to-index mapping to apply during encoding
      blockIndexes - map from each BlockData value to its byte offset in the block-data stream; every BlockData referenced by placements must have an entry
      Returns:
      the serialised index as a byte array, ready to be embedded in a schematic file
